raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Silicon Valley BART extension project will alleviate Bay Area traffic and assist California in meeting its climate change goals.",
    "The state budget allocates $3 million to launch a guaranteed income program for 50 homeless students exiting high school in Santa Clara County.",
    "The Guaranteed Basic Income Pilot Program for Unhoused High School Students provides monthly stipends of $1,200 and various lines of support to recipients.",
    "The Tech Interactive Field Trip Program incorporates hands-on STEM education with exhibits in artificial intelligence, robotics, digital art, and environmental science.",
    "The College of Adaptive Arts offers college-level education for adults with Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities, aiming to provide an equal college experience.",
    "The African American Cultural Center will act as a gathering place to celebrate the achievements of African Americans and provide affordable housing and community services."
  ]
}
```
